title: Universal Tool 30ft Roll Gray Duct Tape 2 Inch Wide High Quality Adhesive Gear
description:
Repair, pack, wrap or bind items with the Universal Tool Duct Tape Roll! This roll comes with 30 feet of high quality duct tape with an aggressive adhesive. The roll is about 2 inches thick, so you'll be able to cover a lot of ground. It comes in a classic gray color, and is constructed of 70 mesh/200um thick. Make sure to keep a few rolls of this super strong adhesive tape in your office, garage, workshop or kitchen for general maintenance!
